22
r_pl_xtrabeneﬁts: REVERSED: Last 6 mths, did health plan offer extra beneﬁts because of health condition
SAS Format: YND
1: NO
2: YES
race_asian: RECODE : Race: Asian
SAS Format: YNE
0: NOT CHECKED
1: CHECKED

0: NOT CHECKED
1: CHECKED

1: HISPANIC OR LATINO
2: NOT HISPANIC OR LATINO
